nodes.name: Tasmanian boobook
nodes.summary: Tasmanian boobook（Tasmanian boobook，学名 Ninox leucopsis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于世界鸟类学家联合会、金岛、豪勳爵島。

nodes.name: 金岛
nodes.summary: 金岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Tasmanian boobook、Black-headed honeyeater、Yellow wattlebird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 豪勳爵島
nodes.summary: 豪勳爵島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括红嘴热带鸟、红尾热带鸟、Kermadec petrel等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 世界鸟类学家联合会
nodes.summary: 世界鸟类学家联合会是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Tasmanian boobook、Green parakeet、Fiery-capped manakin等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |date=2017 |title=Bioacoustic and multi-locus DNA data of Ninox owls support high incidence of extinction and recolonisation on small, low-lying islands across Wallacea |journal=Molecular Phylogenetics and Evolution |volume=109 |pages=246–258 |doi=10.1016/j.ympev.2016.12.024 |pmid=28017857 |bibcode=2017MolPE.109..246G |issn=1055-7903}} It was reclassified as distinct by the International Ornithological Congress in 2022. It is widespread in Tasmania and on King Island and other islands of Bass Strait. It has been recorded in southern Victoria, once from New South Wales, and once from Lord Howe Island. It predominantly occurs in eucalypt forests. It is carnivorous, and a nest predator. The Tasmanian boobook is sexually dimorphic, with males typically being smaller than females
